A lamp post is on the left, a menu stand on the right. The wet floor reflects the frozen urban scene. The entire environment is perfectly still.
[Characters] No characters are visible in close view. Distant blurred silhouettes are present near the edges, lacking any discernible features.
Shot 1 (Eye-Level Full Shot, 1s): Static camera. The entire scene remains perfectly frozen, a single still tableau with no motion.

[Scene] Coffee shop entrance under the awning. The warm light from the glass door spills out into the cool rainy afternoon. The street and blurred pedestrians are visible behind Linh. The entire background is completely frozen in a quiet stillness.
[Characters] Linh: A young woman in her early twenties with a heart-shaped face and dark hair, wearing a soft pink blouse. Her hand is holding out a folded light blue umbrella. Expressing gentle warmth and curiosity. Minh (in foreground, back of head and shoulder visible): A man with black wavy hair, right shoulder and back of his gray crewneck tee visible.
Shot 1 (Over-the-Shoulder Medium Shot, 3s): Static camera
Linh: "Do you need this?"
Action: Linh extends the umbrella toward Minh in a gentle, slow-motion gesture. Her arm straightens, palm open, and a warm, gentle smile forms on her lips. Minh's visible shoulder shifts subtly as he silently reacts to her offer.
